feature: Strict MCP guardrails default true; SG-007 scope-gate; SG-005a/SG-006a brief staleness; nudge revert_recommended hardening + pre-commit gate; brief anti-patterns; ADR relevance + cross-file hint
summary: Closes L7 (revert advisory), L8 (scope warning only), L11 (stale brief undetected) from the Vibe-Coding gap analysis. Moves drift from advisory to enforcing.

BREAKING: agent.strict_guardrails default flipped false -> true. Opt-out via strict_guardrails: false in drift.yaml.

new_guardrail_rules.trigger: brief stale (score drift > 0.1, tool_calls > 20, or age > 30 min)
brief stale (score drift > 0.1, tool_calls > 20, or age > 30 min)

nudge_changes: revert_recommended now requires: not safe_to_commit AND (direction == degrading OR parse_failures > 0 OR git_detection_failed without changed_files)
cross_file_hint added when MDS/AVS are estimated on non-fast-path runs
.drift-cache/last_nudge.json persisted with sha256-16 hashes (schema_version=1) for pre-commit enforcement
brief_changes: Active scope_gate block on scope.confidence < 0.5 with action_required=ask_user and blocking=true
Top-3 anti-patterns surfaced in JSON response and prompt block (## Anti-Patterns section)

pre_commit.blocks_when: revert_recommended AND overlap(changed_files, staged) AND hashes unchanged

rollback.env: DRIFT_SKIP_NUDGE_GATE=1 to bypass pre-commit gate per commit
